alerts.title: Commission and High Representative propose new sanctions regime to counter threats from migrant smuggling, human trafficking, and other forms of organised crime

alerts.title: Commission accepts binding commitments by SAP to address competition concerns about services for its popular business management software

These commitments are now legally binding under EU antitrust rules.
